articles.title: Meta launches cheaper smart glasses without Ray-Ban - The Verge
articles.description: Meta announces the $299 Meta Glasses. They’re not Ray-Bans, but feature an updated AI, adjustable nosepads and temple tips, and a model designed by Kylie Jenner.

articles.title: Here’s how your phone is running after updating to Android 17 - 9to5Google
articles.description: How is Android 17 Pixel performance treating real users? Our latest poll results show a stable update for most, with minimal bugs.
